calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:05am
Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Igor Draguta, appears in pro per with russian interpreter Tatiana Lacona. Respondent, Daniel Moraru, appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge O'Grady.

EXHR (A) printout of messaging log

10:26am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To Feb-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 414
MINI MINUTES: 9:16am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Igor Draguta appears in pro per. Respondent, Daniel Moraru appears in pro per.

Mr. Draguta is in need of an interpreter, matter is continued. Mr. Draguta is told that he must provide an interpreter on the continued date.

9:21am
Matter is continued.
